modesty_register.value: STRICT (Saudi default — modest, no skin, no mixed-gender intimacy)

primary.value: Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Across all 8 images the red gift box is the single most repeated brand-owned object (5 of 8 shots), and the red/gold/cream triad is the only color set the brand

primary.example: exact hex is RED until client confirms

background_tone.value: Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Textile grounds: red Persian carpet in DV6mMArDDq4/DV6od/DXW5KvBDFpe, palm-frond + sadu mat in DV63TOKDCmy/DWFL8, dark warm tungsten in DWmCb6. Cream sweep grou

background_tone.example: exact value RED until client confirms

color_field_palette.value: Three brand-owned fields ONLY, all evidenced from the real packaging/identity: (1) deep crimson oxblood red (the signature gift-box red) ~#9E1B1B–#7E1414; (2) warm gold / mustard-yellow (the eight-point-star lid label + gold serving pot + 'أطلب الان' CTA) ~#C9971F–#E0B23A; (3) cream / ivory off-white (the kraft cup body + star-label field + lower CTA band) ~#F3EAD7. A color-blocking chain fills the frame with crimson, gold, or cream — and pops via their mutual contrast (crimson↔cream, gold↔crimson). EXCLUDE: blue, the carpet's indigo, terracotta-as-field (terracotta is a companion/apron color, not a fill field), and any borrowed reference red/orange.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Crimson is the gift-box color in DV63TOKDCmy, DV6mMArDDq4, DV6od-KjAk4, DXW5KvBDFpe and the round wordmark badge in DWpHuyijLHB. Gold/mustard is the star lid-la

color_field_palette.example: exact value RED until client confirms

capture_character.value: Warm, intimate, appetite-first food photography with a documentary-Najdi-home feel: a single warm directional key (golden/tungsten), shallow depth-of-field isolating the dish, visible steam, glistening samn/oil pooling on the porridge surface, real plated heat — staged on authentic heritage surfaces (sadu weave, tribal carpet, palm-frond mat, clay finjan). Soft-edged shadows, not hard studio editorial; the 'just-served at the family table' character, never sterile pack-shot.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DWmCb6-jAly: extreme macro with visible steam, oil glisten, shallow DOF, clay finjans bokeh'd behind, warm tungsten chiaroscuro. DV63TOKDCmy & DWFL8: warm side

capture_character.example: exact value RED until client confirms

anti_attributes.value: no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

identity_dna.value: «CLIENT: locked identity of جريش — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»

material_finish.value: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot

material_texture.value: Two real substrates in one hero: (a) the FOOD — a thick, creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge with a coarse semi-rough surface, matte except where melted samn/oil pools into glossy golden rivulets that catch the key light; soft, spoonable, holds a peak; topped with glossy roasted-red-pepper + chili-tomato relish (wet, light-reflective). (b) the VESSEL — a white rigid paper/kraft cup (smooth matte sidewall, slight ribbing at the rim) sealed by a cream-and-gold eight-point-star paperboard lid (matte coated stock, flat — not glossy plastic). Substrate behavior: porridge reads soft and gravity-settled; oil reads as specular highlights; the cup reads as rigid matte board, never plastic-shiny.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DWmCb6-jAly shows the coarse matte porridge with glossy oil rivulets and steam; DV63TOKDCmy shows the white kraft cup with chili-tomato topping; the cream/gold

dimensions.value: ≈9–11cm tall single-serve paper cup, ≈10–11cm rim diameter. Scale anchor: the cream-and-gold star lid that sits on it is the same ~10–11cm diameter — so frame the cup as ~1× the lid's width and ~1× a closed adult fist in height. Against the crimson gift box (≈30cm long) the cup is roughly 1/3 the box length.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DV63TOKDCmy and DXW5KvBDFpe show the cup beside its own star lid (matching diameters) and beside the long crimson box; DV6od shows lid, box and cup together for

companion_elements.value: World = the Najdi family table. ONE hero companion: a small glossy roasted-red chili pepper resting on/beside the porridge surface (its real garnish). Restrained background-only context (never co-hero): the cream-gold star lid, the heritage sadu/carpet ground, a wisp of steam.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Roasted/fresh red chili sits on the porridge in DV63TOKDCmy, DV6mMArDDq4, DV6od, DWmCb6, DWFL8 — the dish's consistent real garnish and natural single hero comp

identity_dna.value: «CLIENT: locked identity of رز كابلي — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»

silhouette_description.value: the recognizable form of رز كابلي

material_finish.value: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot

material_texture.value: Loose, separated long-grain rice tinted warm amber-gold from stock and spice, matte with individual glistening oiled grains; topped with dark caramelized braised meat chunks (deep brown, crusted, light-catching fat), bright orange julienned carrot and dark raisins. Served on a polished stainless-steel round platter — high-specular mirror metal with a warm gold-cast reflection of the surroundings. Rice reads granular and soft, meat reads crusted and juicy, platter reads mirror-bright.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXFEJbnjCms shows the steel platter of amber kabuli rice with caramelized meat, orange carrot slivers and raisins, the steel rim throwing warm reflections.

dimensions.value: ≈40–45cm diameter sharing platter (a two-handed serving tray). Scale anchor: held in two adult gloved hands whose span (~18–20cm each) brackets the rim — platter is ~2× a hand-span wide; it covers the carrier's torso. Reads as a multi-person family platter, far larger than the single cup or family foil tray.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXFEJbnjCms: the platter is carried in two gloved hands against the torso, hands bracketing the rim, establishing it as a large communal tray.

companion_elements.value: World = the served-to-table hospitality moment. ONE hero companion: the terracotta-orange branded 'جريشة' apron + dark serving gloves of the person presenting the platter (the human-hands hospitality cue). Restrained context: the heritage textile table edge below.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXFEJbnjCms: the burnt-orange apron with the white جريشة wordmark and black gloves are the single dominant companion, framing the platter as freshly served.
